channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4.9%.

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham 'must be allowed to stand' for parliament, Labour MP argues | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham 'must be allowed to stand' for parliament, Labour MP argues | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: LabourList: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?
item.description: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
item.description: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live
item.description: Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Because I love Nigel Farage and want him to be prime minister. Or, because I didn’t have anything to add other than retweeting my colleagues’ reporting on the issue.
One or the other. Who can say, really?
item.description:
Because I love Nigel Farage and want him to be prime minister. Or, because I didn’t have anything to add other than retweeting my colleagues’ reporting on the issue.
One or the other. Who can say, really?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What Streeting said in his resignation letter – and what he meant
item.description: What Streeting said in his resignation letter – and what he meant

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown
item.description: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting resigns and criticises government's 'drift'
The Guardian: ‘Is he getting rid of Starmer?’ Profile boost for Streeting in Ilford North seat - The Guardian
item.description: ‘Is he getting rid of Starmer?’ Profile boost for Streeting in Ilford North seat - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full
item.description: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full
